title: leioligo erecta
side_effects: Leioligo erecta can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to headaches, dizziness, and even liver damage. Additionally, the plant's high concentration of toxic compounds can cause respiratory problems, including coughing and shortness of breath. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using leioligo erecta for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
